challenges.title: Biometric Stabilization
challenges.defaultCode:
# Stabilize Diana's chassis.
# Define oxygen_level (float) and heart_rate (int)
# Set neuro_sync to True if heart_rate is < 90.

telemetry = {
    'oxygen_level': 0.0,
    'heart_rate': 0,
    'neuro_sync': False
}

hints.wrongType: Diana needs the oxygen_level to be a float. Are you missing a decimal?
hints.falseSync: Neuro-sync is still False! Check your conditional logic to set it to True when the heart rate is safe.

challenges.title: Boss: Sentinel Drone

dialogueIntro.name: Diana
dialogueIntro.text: RECOMMENDATION: SURGE DOCKING PORT WHEN SHIELD IS DOWN.

challenges.defaultCode:
# The system provides a sequence of shield fluctuations.
shield_states = ['up', 'up', 'up', 'down', 'up']

def surge_command():
    print('SURGING POWER')
    return True

# Task: Write a while loop to process states until you hit 'down'.
# Use shield_states.pop(0) to get the next status.

hints.infiniteLoop: Elias, the power cycle is stuck! We need a breaking condition!

challenges.title: Data Venting

dialogueIntro.name: Diana
dialogueIntro.text: Elias, the atmospheric sensors are corrupted with NaN values.

dialogueIntro.name: Diana
dialogueIntro.text: We need to clean the data so we don't vent the wrong sector.

challenges.defaultCode:
import pandas as pd
import io

memory_csv = "timestamp,load,stability\n101,0.45,0.9\n102,,0.85\n103,0.72,"
df = pd.read_csv(io.StringIO(memory_csv))

# 1. Fill missing 'load' values with the mean
# 2. Fill missing 'stability' values using forward fill ('ffill')
# 3. Filter for stability > 0.8 and save to 'diana_memory'

challenges.title: Boss: The Labyrinth Collapse

dialogueIntro.name: Diana
dialogueIntro.text: Vanguard is purging the sector! We have 3 minutes!

dialogueIntro.name: Diana
dialogueIntro.text: Filter the structural dataset for rooms with integrity > 80 to find a safe path.

challenges.defaultCode:
import pandas as pd
import io

# Simulated structural dataset
data = "room_id,integrity\n1,45\n2,85\n3,92\n4,12\n5,81"
rooms = pd.read_csv(io.StringIO(data))

# Filter for integrity > 80
# Convert the room_id column to a list and save as 'safe_route'
safe_route = []

print(f"SAFE ROUTE: {safe_route}")

hints.wrongFilter: Check the filter condition. We need integrity greater than 80!
